zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Vawdrey於大約1465年出生在英國英格蘭爾包頓時，他的父親Thomas Vawdrey29歲，母親Anne Newton20歲。他和Alice Bereton至少有5個兒子。他埋葬在英國英格蘭爾包頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Vawdrey于大约1465年出生在英国英格兰爾包頓时，他的父亲Thomas Vawdrey29岁，母亲Anne Newton20岁。他和Alice Bereton至少有5个儿子。他埋葬在英国英格兰爾包頓。

nameMeanings.name: Vawdrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Vaudrey
meanings: French, Huguenot: (i) locative name from Vaudrey (Jura). (ii) relationship name possibly in some cases an anglicized spelling of Vaudré(e), from the Germanic personal name Waldrad, composed of waldan ‘ruler’ + rad ‘counsel’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Vawdrey was born about 1465, in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Vawdrey, was 29 and his mother, Anne Newton, was 20. He had at least 5 sons with Alice Bereton. He was buried in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Vawdrey est né environ 1465, à Bowdon, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Vawdrey, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anne Newton, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Alice Bereton. Ilenterré à Bowdon, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Vawdrey um 1465 in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Vawdrey 29 und seine Mutter Anne Newton 20. Er hatte mit Alice Bereton mindestens 5 Söhne. Er wurde in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Vawdrey è nato il circa 1465 nel Bowdon, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Vawdrey, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Anne Newton, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Alice Bereton. Fu sepolto a Bowdon, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Vawdreyが約1465年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアボウドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Vawdreyは29歳，母Anne Newtonは20歳であった。彼はAlice Beretonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアボウドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Vawdrey(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보우던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Vawdrey(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Newton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Alice Bereton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보우던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Vawdrey nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Bowdon, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Vawdrey, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Anne Newton, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Alice Bereton. Ele foi sepultado em Bowdon, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Vawdrey родился около 1465 г. в местности боудон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Vawdrey было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Newton, 20. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Alice Bereton. Он был похоронен в местности боудон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
